config.cloudflare_tunnel.info: Stel lokale diensten veilig beschikbaar op internet via het wereldwijde Cloudflare-netwerk met cloudflared. Ondersteunt Docker en native binary.
config.cloudflare_tunnel.disabled_desc: Schakel de schakelaar in om Cloudflare Tunnels te beheren voor veilige externe toegang tot uw lokale diensten.
config.cloudflare_tunnel.token_hint: Store your Cloudflare connector token in the Secrets Vault with key 'cloudflared_token'.
config.cloudflare_tunnel.named_hint: Sla de inhoud van uw credentials.json op in de Secrets Vault met sleutel 'cloudflared_credentials'.
config.cloudflare_tunnel.expose_single_h: Token and Quick tunnels use a single origin URL. Only one service can be the tunnel destination. Use Named Tunnel for multi-service routing via separate hostnames.
config.cloudflare_tunnel.expose_named_hi: Named tunnels ondersteunen meerdere ingress-regels — beide diensten kunnen tegelijk worden blootgesteld via aparte hostnames.
config.cloudflare_tunnel.loopback_label: Loopback HTTP port for cloudflared (avoids TLS)
config.cloudflare_tunnel.loopback_hint: Opens a plain HTTP port on 127.0.0.1 only. cloudflared connects to this instead of the HTTPS port — no certificate verification needed. The port is assigned automatically.
config.cloudflare_tunnel.general_desc: Schakel de tunnel in en configureer basisinstellingen.
